response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior generalist with strong full-stack, DLang, and Node.js background, but the role demands deep Java/Kotlin/JVM and Spring ecosystem expertise along with genuine interest in IDE internals. Java appears only as a listed skill with limited project context (robotic arms, mobile orchestration tooling years ago), and there is no evidence of Kotlin, Spring, Hibernate, Quarkus, or language-tooling/IDE-internals work. The brief LabWindows/CVI stint at NI is the closest IDE-adjacent experience but was in C/C++ a decade ago.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD)
Some IDE-adjacent exposure via NI LabWindows/CVI (C/C++ IDE components)
Strong communication skills evidenced by workshops, talks, and teaching
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Hibernate/Quarkus or modern enterprise Java experience
No Kotlin experience listed anywhere on the resume
No evidence of IDE internals, language tooling, or deep JVM work

key_factors.factor: Senior engineering maturity and large-scale systems track record
